title: 2026 RM Triathlon Registration Is Open
excerpt: Registration is now open for Super Sprint, Sprint, and Olympic distances. Early pricing is available for a limited time.

title: Windburn Winter Training Block Highlights
excerpt: Athletes completed the winter block with strong swim progress, improved bike power, and run consistency across all squads.

title: Coach Team Update for 2026
